page_metadata.biotools__summary: Structure-based multiple-level protein function predictions. By structurally threading low-resolution structural models through the BioLiP library, it infers three categories of protein functions including gene ontology, enzyme commission and ligand-binding sites from various analogous and homologous function templates.
